snapshot.description: Initialize Next.js 16, TailwindCSS, HeroUI, standard dependencies, and default configurations.
snapshot.title: Setup project bootstrap and initial Next.js codebase

changes.newValue:
1. Initialize Next.js 16 app in root using npx -y create-next-app@latest ./ --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --import-alias "@/*"
2. Install core packages (heroui, framer-motion, axios, node-cron, chart.js, react-chartjs-2, zod, lucide-react)
3. Verify basic builds and configurations.
